scripts.dev:exchange: cd apps/exchange && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 bun --env-file=../../.env run dev
scripts.dev:exchange:local: cd apps/exchange && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 NEXT_PUBLIC_SOLANA_CLUSTER=localnet NEXT_PUBLIC_SOLANA_RPC_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8899 bun --env-file=../../.env run dev
scripts.dev:issuance: cd apps/issuance-portal && PORT=3001 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 bun --env-file=../../.env run dev
scripts.dev:admin: cd apps/admin && PORT=3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 bun --env-file=../../.env run dev
scripts.seed:demo: cd apps/api && ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8899 bun --env-file=../../.env run seed
